_comment: The doc registry (design/DOC-SYSTEM.md). Per block: landed version, source file under operational/shared/blocks/, and the carrier docs — verbatim (variant: null) or a NAMED per-level adaptation (variant: <file>). anchor = the heading tools/render_blocks.py splices the block before when it is not yet landed. Registry order = document order for blocks sharing an anchor. GREEN CHECKS = MECHANICAL CONFORMANCE ONLY — doc health belongs to the judgment layer.

gate-output-contract.duty: each level's completion gate produces a named altitude-specific artifact; never re-run lower-level verification (LR-13 cure)
gate-output-contract.notes: v1 = the splice_gate_contracts.py landing (legacy marker '<!-- gate-output-contract (LR-13) -->'), migrated verbatim into this scheme as v2. Every carrier is an adaptation — there is no base. L2's variant includes the Small-Project Scale-Down section the same splice landed. L5+ gains the GATE-OUTPUT-CONTRACTS-DRAFT §4 statement, completing the per-level gate-artifact set. L3 deliberately has NO adaptation (no L3 gate artifact was ever drafted — its integration judgment lives in report.md; see DOC-SYSTEM 'Known non-coverage').

plan-first.duty: first act = plan.md (goal + checklist; fixed final three items); mirror in the runtime task tool; a respawned successor inherits the file

report-contract.duty: report.md required at DONE at every level (E2 refuses without it); shared template; given requirement IDs cited as bare references

trace-discipline.duty: trace stanzas declared once in declaring artifacts; downstream docs cite bare IDs and never re-declare; given IDs never re-minted
